narrative:
Precinct Pulaski North (precinct in Williams County) has 1,047 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.7 percentage points.
